ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hotel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the hotel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the hotel */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the hotel's website */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the hotel */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the hotel (1 to 5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "room_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the room type (e.g., Standard, Deluxe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests allowed in the room */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities provided in the room */,
  "size_sqm" REAL /* Size of the room in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel offering the pricing */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of room */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the pricing period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the pricing period */,
  "twin_price" REAL /* Price for twin occupancy */,
  "triple_price" REAL /* Price for triple occupancy */,
  "single_price" REAL /* Price for single occupancy */,
  "child_no_bed_price" REAL /* Price for child without bed */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price for the room type */,
  "seasonal_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for seasonal pricing */,
  "minimum_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for a reservation */,
  "maximum_stay" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for a reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel for the reservation */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room type reserved */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the reservation */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the reservation */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the reservation */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price calculated for the reservation */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the reservation */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Specific room number assigned to the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, checked-in, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reservation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reservation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer in the loyalty program */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Level of the customer in the loyalty program (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user in the system */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., front desk, manager, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments made by the customer in the review */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the service provided (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "cleanliness_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the cleanliness of the room (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the value for money (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel for the analytics */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date for the analytics report */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate percentage for the hotel on that date */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the hotel on that date */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room type for the analytics */,
  "average_daily_rate" REAL /* Average daily rate for the hotel */,
  "revenue_per_available_room" REAL /* Revenue per available room (RevPAR) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)
